name: Catalyst Metals Limited
analysis: CYL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.1000, stop A$4.4352, target A$6.7600 (0.40:1) — then trail it.
